text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Beneficiary Plan Election and Auto-Assignment │ October 2021 │ V 1.3 7 

CRNT_PREV_YR_CHOOSER 

LABEL: Part D Plan Self Selection in Current or Previous Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan choice was in the current or previous year. For beneficiaries 
where the variable CHOOSER = “Y”, this variable indicates whether the beneficiary made their Part D 
plan self-selection in the current year or the previous
